items.limitationEn: Due to methodological heterogeneity across included studies, it was difficult to establish uniform weighted criteria, and evidence quality varied.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (N=1,372) found that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]; p < .01) in patients with knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析坐实了短波透热（SWD）对膝骨关节炎（KOA）的显著益处，包括减轻疼痛和改善行走能力。你可以更有信心地将 SWD 纳入 KOA 患者的治疗方案中，尤其是当疼痛管理和功能改善是主要目标时。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 17 项试验（N=1,372）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均值 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和行走能力（平均值 -0.72；95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the significant benefits of shortwave diathermy (SWD) for knee osteoarthritis (KOA), including pain reduction and improved walking ability. You can more confidently integrate SWD into your treatment plans for KOA patients, especially when pain management and functional improvement are primary goals.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的证据确定性（certainty of evidence）可能因其研究设计和实施质量而有所不同。
items.limitationEn: The certainty of evidence for included studies may vary due to their design and implementation quality.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that fatigue, knee symptoms, and functional capacity are concurrently associated with physical activity levels, highlighting the complex interplay of these factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察研究揭示了肥胖女性体力活动水平与疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力之间的关联。它强调了在康复干预中，除了运动处方，还需要关注这些关联性，以更全面地提升患者的体力活动水平。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性进行的横断面研究发现，疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力与体力活动水平同时相关，突显了这些因素之间复杂的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study reveals associations between physical activity levels, fatigue, knee symptoms, and functional capacity in women with obesity. It emphasizes the need to address these interrelationships in rehabilitation interventions, beyond just exercise prescriptions, to comprehensively improve patients' physical activity.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，只能揭示关联性，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, which can only reveal associations and not establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT with 24 ACLR male athletes found that eight weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors, suggesting it addresses neuromuscular deficits post-injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 强调了视觉干扰训练在 ACL 重建术后重返运动中的重要性，因为它能改善运动员在意外切向运动中的下肢生物力学和减少错误。你应该考虑将这类认知-运动双任务训练整合到你的重返运动方案中。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员 8 周视觉干扰训练对意外切向运动下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 24 名 ACL 重建术后男性运动员的随机对照试验发现，8 周的视觉干扰训练显著改善了意外切向运动中的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，提示其能弥补损伤后的神经肌肉缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT highlights the importance of visual perturbation training for return to sport after ACL reconstruction, as it improves lower-limb biomechanics and reduces errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers. You should consider integrating such cognitive-motor dual-task training into your return-to-sport protocols.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（N=24），且仅限于男性运动员，可能限制了结果对其他人群的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively small sample size (N=24) and was limited to male athletes, which may restrict generalizability to other populations.
